modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty completing Master Promissory Note (MPN) as a student borrower.

full_description_text:  
I'm having trouble completing my Master Promissory Note (MPN) as a student borrower. I’m not sure what steps I need to take to finish it. It feels a bit confusing, and I could really use some guidance on how to proceed with this process.
short_description: Difficulty completing Master Promissory Note (MPN) as a student borrower.
